subject: fix(build): remove unused onUnmounted import from useDarkMode
body:
vue-tsc strict mode catches unused imports. onUnmounted was left over
from early drafting — this composable is module-level (never unmounts),
so the import was dead code.

Tags: build, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 4
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: dark-mode
Semver: patch

title: remove unused onUnmounted import from useDarkMode
